message:
fix(service): pending counter leak in Buffer when poll_ready errors

When the inner service's poll_ready returns Ready(Err(e)), the
BufferFuture transitioned directly to the Error state without
decrementing the pending counter. Since Error/Done states don't carry
the shared reference, Drop also skipped the decrement.

Each such error permanently consumed one buffer slot. After `capacity`
errors, the buffer became permanently full — all subsequent poll_ready
calls returned Pending forever (deadlock).

Fix: decrement pending and wake ready_wakers before transitioning to
the Error state, matching the pattern used in the Active completion
path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
